zh.Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France: 法國豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Gauthier IV de Heilly於1217年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆海利時，他的父親Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly47歲，母親Marie de Picquigny17歲。他和Jeanne de Picquigny至少有6個兒子和8個女兒。他去世於1246年在他的家鄉享年29歲。

zh-hans.Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France: 法国豪-德-福朗斯索姆海利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gauthier IV de Heilly于1217年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆海利时，他的父亲Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly47岁，母亲Marie de Picquigny17岁。他和Jeanne de Picquigny至少有6个儿子和8个女儿。他去世于1246年在他的家乡享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heilly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brennan, Brigid, Ciaran, Conor, Kieran, Aidan, Aileen, Caitlin, Clancy, Colm, Conn.
Irish: from Ó Raghailligh, see O'Reilly .

variants.name: Reiley
meanings: Irish: variant of   Reilly  .
Altered form of German Reile or of Reihle, avariant of Reil 2, 3.

variants.name: O'Reilly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Mairead, Aidan, Colm, Declan, Dermot, Dympna, Eamon, Finbar, Brennan, Brian Patrick, Brid.

Irish (Cavan, Meath): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Raghailligh ‘descendant of Raghailleach’, Old Irish Roghallach, a personal name of unexplained etymology. This is the name of a chieftain family in County Cavan, related to the O'Rourkes. In Anglicized form it has also been confused with Ó Raithile found in Munster, usually Anglicized as O'Rahilly.

variants.name: Rahilly
meanings: Irish (Kerry and Cork): perhaps from Ó Raghailligh (see Reilly ), but more likely from the surname Ó Raithile ‘descendant of Raithile’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. This surname is common in Munster, where it is also Anglicized as O'Rahilly.

variants.name: Reilley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan.
Irish: variant of   Reilly  .

variants.name: Riely
meanings: Irish: variant of   Reilly  .

nameMeanings.name: Gauthier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See Walter .

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Gauthier IV de Heilly was born in 1217, in Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France, his father, Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly, was 47 and his mother, Marie de Picquigny, was 17. He had at least 6 sons and 8 daughters with Jeanne de Picquigny. He died in 1246, in his hometown, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gauthier IV de Heilly est né en 1217, à Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Marie de Picquigny, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles avec Jeanne de Picquigny. Il est décédé en 1246, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gauthier IV de Heilly 1217 in Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly 47 und seine Mutter Marie de Picquigny 17. Er hatte mit Jeanne de Picquigny mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1246 im Alter von 29 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gauthier IV de Heilly è nato il nel 1217 nel Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Marie de Picquigny, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie con Jeanne de Picquigny. Morì nel 1246, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.Heilly, Somme, Picardie, França: フランスピカーディソンメヘイリー
ja.Heilly, Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメヘイリー
ja.Heilly, Somme, Hauts-de-France, France: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスソンメヘイリー
ja.lifeSummary: Gauthier IV de Heillyが1217年にフランスピカーディソンメヘイリーで生まれた時，父Seigneur Thibaud III de Heillyは47歳，母Marie de Picquignyは17歳であった。彼はJeanne de Picquignyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘をもうけた。彼は1246年に故郷で29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gauthier IV de Heilly(이)가 1217년 프랑스 피카디 솜 헤이리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie de Picquigny(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Jeanne de Picquigny(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1246년 그의 고향에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gauthier IV de Heilly nasceu em 1217, em Heilly, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Picquigny, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas com Jeanne de Picquigny. Ele faleceu em 1246, em sua cidade natal, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gauthier IV de Heilly родился в 1217 г. в местности хилли, сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Picquigny, 17. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей от Jeanne de Picquigny. Он умер в 1246 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gauthier IV de Heilly nació en 1217, en Heilly, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Seigneur Thibaud III de Heilly, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Marie de Picquigny, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas con Jeanne de Picquigny. Murió en 1246, en su pueblo, a la edad de 29 años.
